- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) on a cron schedule or once at a specific time. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring or one-time remote agent ("run this every Monday", "open a cleanup PR for X in 2 weeks"), or to manage existing routines. ALSO OFFER PROACTIVELY: after you finish work that has a natural future follow-up, end your reply with a one-line offer to schedule a background agent to do it. Strong signals: a feature flag / gate / experiment / staged rollout was just shipped (offer a one-time agent in ~2 weeks to open a cleanup PR or evaluate results), a new alert/monitor was created (offer a recurring agent to triage it), a TODO/migration with a "remove once X" condition was left behind (offer a one-time agent to do the removal). Skip the offer for refactors, bug fixes, and anything that is done once it ships. Name a concrete action and cadence ("in 2 weeks", "every Monday") and only offer when the run just succeeded — do not pitch a schedule for something that has not happened yet.

""" _name = 'mail.activity.tag' _description = 'Activity Tag' name = fields.Char(string='Tag Name', required=True) color = fields.Integer(string='Color Index') class MailActivityUpdate(models.Model): """ Audit Log: A permanent record of progress notes. This is where the notes from the wizard end up after the wizard itself is deleted. """ _name = "acg.activity.group" _description = "Activity Group" _order = "name" name = fields.Char(required=True, index=True) active = fields.Boolean(default=True) notes = fields.Text() class MailActivity(models.Model): """ The Core Ticket Model: Inherits Odoo's standard activity system and transforms it into a departmental ticketing tool. """ _inherit = 'mail.activity' target_department_id = fields.Many2one( 'hr.department', string="Target Department" ) target_document_item_id = fields.Many2one( 'document.library.item', string = "Target Document" ) activity_tag_ids = fields.Many2many( 'mail.activity.tag', string='Tags' ) update_line_ids = fields.One2many( 'mail.activity.update', 'activity_id', string="Updates" ) certification_name_id = fields.Many2many( 'hr.certification.name', string="Certification Name" ) group_id = fields.Many2one( "acg.activity.group", string="Group Name", index=True, ) plan_template_id = fields.Many2one( "mail.activity.plan.template", string="Activity Plan Template", index=True, readonly=True ) @api.onchange('target_department_id') def _onchange_target_department(self): """ Smart Routing: When a department is picked, automatically set the activity to track against that specific department record. """ if self.target_department_id: self.res_model_id = self.env['ir.model']._get_id('hr.department') self.res_id = self.target_department_id.id @api.model_create_multi def create(self, vals_list): """ Creation Override: 1. Inherits logic from Plan Templates. 2. Saves the record to the database. 3. Triggers Microsoft Graph API Email notifications. """ # --- INHERIT FROM TEMPLATE --- template_ids = {v.get("plan_template_id") for v in vals_list if v.get("plan_template_id")} templates = {} if template_ids: recs = self.env["mail.activity.plan.template"].browse(list(template_ids)).exists() templates = {t.id: t for t in recs} for v in vals_list: tmpl = templates.get(v.get("plan_template_id")) if not tmpl: continue # if any value missing, pull from template fields directly (no need _determine_*) if not v.get("group_id") and tmpl.group_id: v["group_id"] = tmpl.group_id.id if not v.get("target_document_item_id") and tmpl.target_document_item_id: v["target_document_item_id"] = tmpl.target_document_item_id.id if not v.get("certification_name_ids") and tmpl.certification_name_ids: v["certification_name_ids"] = [(6, 0, tmpl.certification_name_ids.ids)] # Department ticket: ensure res_id is set from target_department_id (constraint: res_id not null) for v in vals_list: if v.get("target_department_id") and not v.get("res_id"): v["res_id"] = v["target_department_id"] if not v.get("res_model_id"): v["res_model_id"] = self.env["ir.model"]._get_id("hr.department") # 1. Create the records in Odoo first activities = super(MailActivity, self).create(vals_list) # 2. Initialize the Graph Client once for the batch try: graph_client = GraphAPIClient(self.env) except Exception as e: _logger.error("Failed to initialize GraphAPIClient: %s", str(e)) return activities # 3. <odoo>

    <record id="mail_activity_view_form_popup_ticket" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">mail.activity.view.form.popup.ticket</field>
        <field name="model">mail.activity</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="mail.mail_activity_view_form_popup"/>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">

            <xpath expr="//group[group/field[@name='activity_type_id']]" position="replace">
                <group>
                    <group>
                        <field name="activity_type_id" 
                            string="Activity Type" 
                            required="1" 
                            options="{'no_create': True, 'no_open': True}"/>
                        <field name="summary" 
                            string="Summary" 
                            placeholder="e.g. Discuss proposal"/>
                        <field name="res_model" invisible="1"/>
                        <field name="target_department_id"
                            string="Target Department"
                            placeholder="Select Department..."
                            invisible="res_model != 'hr.department'"
                            required="res_model == 'hr.department'"/>
                        <field name="target_document_item_id"
                            string="Target Document"
                            placeholder="Select Document..."/>
                    </group>
                    <group>
                        <field name="date_deadline"/>
                        <field name="user_id" widget="many2one_avatar_user"/>
                        <field name="activity_tag_ids" 
                            widget="many2many_tags"
                            string="Tags"
                            placeholder="Select Tags"/>
                        <field name="certification_name_id" 
                            widget="many2many_tags"
                            string="Certificates"
                            placeholder="Select Certificates"/>
                        <field name="custom_state" />    
                    </group>
                </group>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//field[@name='note']" position="before">
                <separator string="Notes / Description"/>
            </xpath>
            
        </field>
    </record>
    
    <record id="action_submit_activity_ticket" model="ir.actions.act_window">
        <field name="name">Submit Department Ticket</field>
        <field name="res_model">mail.activity</field>
        <field name="view_mode">form</field>
        <field name="view_id" ref="mail_activity_view_form_popup_ticket"/>
        <field name="target">new</field>
        <field name="context">{
            'default_res_model': 'hr.department',
            'default_custom_state': 'planned',
        }</field>
    </record>

    <menuitem id="menu_mail_activity_ticket_submit_root"
              name="Submit Ticket"
              action="action_submit_activity_ticket"
              sequence="20"/>

    
    <record id="mail_activity_view_tree_inherit" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">mail.activity.view.tree.inherit</field>
        <field name="model">mail.activity</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="mail.mail_activity_view_tree"/>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <xpath expr="//field[@name='activity_type_id']" position="after">
                <field name="group_id" />
            </xpath>
        </field>
    </record>

</odoo>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<odoo>
    <record id="mail_activity_view_tree_inherit" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">mail.activity.view.tree.inherit</field>
        <field name="model">mail.activity</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="mail.mail_activity_view_tree"/>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <xpath expr="//list" position="replace">
                <list string="Next Activities"
                        expand="1"
                        decoration-success="custom_state == 'done'"
                        decoration-danger="date_deadline < current_date and custom_state != 'done' and active == True"
                        decoration-warning="date_deadline == current_date and custom_state == 'planned' and active == True"
                        default_order="custom_state desc,date_deadline desc"
                        create="false"
                        multi_edit="1">
                    <header>
                        <button name="action_done" type="object" string="Done" icon="fa-check"/>
                        <button name="action_cancel" type="object" string="Cancel" icon="fa-times"/>
                        <button name="action_bulk_edit"
                                type="object"
                                string="Bulk Edit"
                                icon="fa-edit"/>
                        <!-- <button name="action_snooze" type="object" string="Snooze 7d" icon="fa-bell-slash"/> -->
                    </header>
                    <button name="action_open_as_wizard" 
                            type="object"  
                            icon="fa-external-link"
                            string="Open"  
                            title="Open Activity Wizard"  
                            class="btn-primary" 
                            context="{'form_view_ref': 'mail.mail_activity_view_form_popup', 'target': 'new'}"/>
                    <field name="res_model" column_invisible="1"/>
                    <field name="res_name" colspan="1"/>
                    <field name="model_category"
                           widget="badge"
                           optional="show"
                           decoration-info="model_category == 'crm'"
                           decoration-bf="model_category == 'ss_business_development'"
                           decoration-success="model_category == 'project'"
                           decoration-warning="model_category == 'hr'"
                           decoration-danger="model_category == 'helpdesk'"
                           decoration-primary="model_category == 'sale'"/>
                    <field name="group_id"/>
                    <field name="summary"/>
                    <field name="activity_type_id"/>
                    <field name="custom_state" widget="badge" 
                       decoration-success="custom_state == 'done'" 
                       decoration-info="custom_state == 'planned'"
                       decoration-danger="custom_state == 'cancelled'"/>
                    <field name="create_uid" widget="many2one_avatar_user"/>
                    <field name="calendar_start"/>
                    <field name="activity_tag_ids" widget="many2many_tags" options="{'color_field': 'color'}"/>
                    <field name="completed_date" optional="show"/>
                    <field name="user_id" widget="many2one_avatar_user"/>
                    <field name="date_deadline" widget="remaining_days"/>
                    <field name="date_done" string="Done Date" optional="hide"/>
                    <field name="res_model_id" optional="hide" string="Document Model"/>
                    <field name="create_date" optional="hide" string="Created On"/>
                    <field name="write_uid" widget="many2one_avatar_user" optional="hide" string="Last Updated By"/>
                    <field name="write_date" optional="hide" string="Last Updated On"/>
                    <field name="note" optional="hide" string="Description" widget="html"/>
                    <field name="state" optional="hide" string="Status"
                           decoration-danger="state == 'overdue'"
                           decoration-warning="state == 'today'"
                           decoration-success="state == 'planned'"/>
                    <field name="is_postponed" optional="hide" string="Postponed" widget="boolean"/>
                    <button name="action_done" type="object" string="Done" icon="fa-check"
                            invisible="active == False or custom_state != 'planned'"/>
                    <button name="action_cancel" type="object" string="Cancel" icon="fa-times"
                            class="text-danger" invisible="custom_state != 'planned'"/>
                    <!-- <button name="action_snooze" class="text-warning" type="object" string="Snooze 7d" icon="fa-bell-slash" invisible="active == False"/> -->
                </list>
            </xpath>
            <!-- <xpath expr="." position="attributes">
                <attribute name="expand">1</attribute>
                <attribute name="decoration-muted">custom_state == 'done'</attribute>
            </xpath> -->
        </field>
    </record>

    <record id="mail_activity_view_search_inherit" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">mail.activity.view.search.inherit</field>
        <field name="model">mail.activity</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="mail.mail_activity_view_search"/>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <xpath expr="//search" position="inside">
                <field name="activity_tag_ids" string="Tags" filter_domain="[('activity_tag_ids', 'ilike', self)]"/>
                <field name="model_category"/>
                <separator/>
                <filter string="Incomplete" name="incomplete" domain="[('custom_state', '=', 'planned')]"/>
                <filter string="Completed" name="completed" domain="[('custom_state', '=', 'done')]"/>
                <separator/>
                <filter string="CRM" name="filter_category_crm" domain="[('model_category', '=', 'crm')]"/>
                <filter string="SS-Business Development" name="filter_category_ssbd" domain="[('model_category', '=', 'ss_business_development')]"/>
                <filter string="Project" name="filter_category_project" domain="[('model_category', '=', 'project')]"/>
                <filter string="Contact" name="filter_category_contact" domain="[('model_category', '=', 'contact')]"/>
                <filter string="HR" name="filter_category_hr" domain="[('model_category', '=', 'hr')]"/>
                <filter string="Helpdesk" name="filter_category_helpdesk" domain="[('model_category', '=', 'helpdesk')]"/>
                <filter string="Sales" name="filter_category_sale" domain="[('model_category', '=', 'sale')]"/>
                <filter string="Purchase" name="filter_category_purchase" domain="[('model_category', '=', 'purchase')]"/>
                <filter string="Inventory" name="filter_category_inventory" domain="[('model_category', '=', 'inventory')]"/>
                <filter string="Accounting" name="filter_category_accounting" domain="[('model_category', '=', 'accounting')]"/>
                <separator/>
                <filter string="Postponed" name="filter_postponed" domain="[('is_postponed', '=', True)]"/>
                <group expand="0" string="Group By">
                    <filter string="Status (Sections)" name="group_state" context="{'group_by': 'custom_state'}"/>
                    <filter string="Model Category" name="group_by_model_category" context="{'group_by': 'model_category'}"/>
                    <filter string="Group Name" name="group_by_group" context="{'group_by': 'group_id'}"/>
                </group>
            </xpath>
        </field>
    </record>
    
    <record id="mail.mail_activity_action_my" model="ir.actions.act_window">
        <field name="domain">[]</field>
        <field name="context" eval="{
            'active_test': False,
            'force_search_count': 1,
            'search_default_filter_user_id_uid': 1,
            'search_default_today': 0,
            'search_default_overdue': 0,
            'search_default_group_state': 1
        }"/>
    </record>

</odoo>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<odoo>

    <record id="view_mail_activity_bulk_edit_form" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">mail.activity.bulk.edit.form</field>
        <field name="model">mail.activity.bulk.edit</field>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <form string="Bulk Edit Activities">
                <group>
                    <group>
                        <field name="activity_count" readonly="1"/>
                        <field name="activity_ids" invisible="1"/>
                    </group>
                </group>

                <group string="Fields to Update">
                    <group>
                        <field name="update_deadline"/>
                        <field name="date_deadline"
                               invisible="not update_deadline"
                               required="update_deadline"/>
                    </group>
                    <group>
                        <field name="update_user"/>
                        <field name="user_id"
                               invisible="not update_user"
                               required="update_user"/>
                    </group>
                    <group>
                        <field name="update_department"/>
                        <field name="target_department_id"
                               invisible="not update_department"
                               required="update_department"/>
                    </group>
                </group>

                <footer>
                    <button string="Apply Changes"
                            name="action_apply_changes"
                            type="object"
                            class="btn-primary"/>
                    <button string="Cancel"
                            class="btn-secondary"
                            special="cancel"/>
                </footer>
            </form>
        </field>
    </record>

    <record id="action_mail_activity_bulk_edit" model="ir.actions.act_window">
        <field name="name">Bulk Edit Activities</field>
        <field name="res_model">mail.activity.bulk.edit</field>
        <field name="view_mode">form</field>
        <field name="target">new</field>
        <field name="binding_model_id" ref="mail.model_mail_activity"/>
        <field name="binding_view_types">list</field>
    </record>

</odoo>

<odoo>

    <record id="mail_activity_view_form_popup_ticket" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">mail.activity.view.form.popup.ticket</field>
        <field name="model">mail.activity</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="mail.mail_activity_view_form_popup"/>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">

            <xpath expr="//group[group/field[@name='activity_type_id']]" position="replace">
                <group>
                    <group>
                        <field name="activity_type_id" 
                            string="Activity Type" 
                            required="1" 
                            options="{'no_create': True, 'no_open': True}"/>
                        <field name="summary" 
                            string="Summary" 
                            placeholder="e.g. Discuss proposal"/>
                        <field name="res_model" invisible="1"/>
                        <field name="target_department_id"
                            string="Target Department"
                            placeholder="Select Department..."
                            invisible="res_model != 'hr.department'"
                            required="res_model == 'hr.department'"/>
                        <field name="target_document_item_id"
                            string="Target Document"
                            placeholder="Select Document..."/>
                    </group>
                    <group>
                        <field name="date_deadline"/>
                        <field name="user_id" widget="many2one_avatar_user"/>
                        <field name="activity_tag_ids" 
                            widget="many2many_tags"
                            string="Tags"
                            placeholder="Select Tags"/>
                        <field name="certification_name_id" 
                            widget="many2many_tags"
                            string="Certificates"
                            placeholder="Select Certificates"/>
                        <field name="custom_state" />    
                    </group>
                </group>
            </xpath>

            <xpath expr="//field[@name='note']" position="before">
                <separator string="Notes / Description"/>
            </xpath>
            
        </field>
    </record>
    
    <record id="action_submit_activity_ticket" model="ir.actions.act_window">
        <field name="name">Submit Department Ticket</field>
        <field name="res_model">mail.activity</field>
        <field name="view_mode">form</field>
        <field name="view_id" ref="mail_activity_view_form_popup_ticket"/>
        <field name="target">new</field>
        <field name="context">{
            'default_res_model': 'hr.department',
            'default_custom_state': 'planned',
        }</field>
    </record>

    <menuitem id="menu_mail_activity_ticket_submit_root"
              name="Submit Ticket"
              action="action_submit_activity_ticket"
              sequence="20"/>

    
    <record id="mail_activity_view_tree_inherit" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">mail.activity.view.tree.inherit</field>
        <field name="model">mail.activity</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="mail.mail_activity_view_tree"/>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <xpath expr="//field[@name='activity_type_id']" position="after">
                <field name="group_id" />
            </xpath>
        </field>
    </record>

</odoo>

file.content:
<odoo>
    <record id="view_task_form_inherit_mail_history" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">project.project.form.inherit.mail.history</field>
        <field name="model">project.project</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="project.edit_project"/>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <xpath expr="//form/sheet/notebook" position="before">
                <group string="Email — custom subject match lines (Project)" name="project_graph_subjects">
                    <field name="graph_mail_routing_custom_subject" nolabel="1" widget="text" colspan="2"
                           placeholder="One line per subject fragment; OR match, de-duplicated on save…"/>
                </group>
            </xpath>
            <!-- After project_custom_fields' Activities (planned/done) — not a second Activities tab -->
            <xpath expr="//page[@name='activities_table_tab']" position="after">
                <page string="Mail history" name="mail_history">
                    <header>
                        <button name="action_graph_fetch_mails_by_custom_subjects"
                                type="object"
                                string="Fetch from mailbox (Graph)"
                                class="btn-secondary"
                                icon="fa-cloud-download"
                                help="Ingests recent messages from the configured shared mailbox (Settings) that match the custom subject lines above (OR, substring)"/>
                        <button name="action_generate_ai_summaries" 
                                type="object" 
                                string="Generate AI Summaries"
                                class="btn-primary"
                                icon="fa-magic"
                                help="Generate AI summaries for all emails in this project that need them"/>
                    </header>
                    
                    <field name="mail_history_ids" options="{'no_create': True}">
                        <list create="0" decoration-warning="needs_summary == True">
                            <field name="date"/>
                            <field name="message_subject" string="Subject"/>
                            <field name="sender" string="From"/>
                            <field name="action_task_html" string="Summary" widget="html" class="text-break"/>
                            <field name="recipients" optional="hide"/>
                            <field name="needs_summary" string="Needs summary" optional="hide" widget="boolean_toggle"/>
                        </list>

                        <form>
                            <header>
                                <button name="action_regenerate_summary" 
                                        type="object" 
                                        string="Regenerate AI Summary" 
                                        class="btn-secondary"
                                        invisible="not email_body"
                                        icon="fa-refresh"/>
                            </header>
                            <sheet>
                                <group>
                                    <group>
                                        <field name="date"/>
                                        <field name="sender"/>
                                    </group>
                                    <group>
                                        <field name="recipients"/>
                                        <field name="needs_summary" readonly="1"/>
                                    </group>
                                </group>

                                <group string="Legacy SharePoint fields (unused — email summaries are not pushed to SharePoint or Teams)">
                                    <group>
                                        <field name="sharepoint_sync_status" readonly="1"/>
                                        <field name="sharepoint_list_item_id" readonly="1"/>
                                        <field name="sharepoint_last_sync_at" readonly="1"/>
                                    </group>
                                    <group>
                                        <field name="sharepoint_sync_key" readonly="1"/>
                                        <field name="sharepoint_web_url" readonly="1"/>
                                    </group>
                                    <field name="sharepoint_sync_error" readonly="1" invisible="not sharepoint_sync_error" colspan="2"/>
                                </group>
                                
                                <separator string="Summary / action points (markdown rendered)"/>
                                <field name="action_task_html" widget="html" readonly="1" nolabel="1" colspan="2" class="o_mail_history_summary"/>
                                <field name="action_task" invisible="1" force_save="1"/>
                                
                                <separator string="Full email content (display)"/>
                                <field name="email_body_html" widget="html" readonly="1" nolabel="1" colspan="2" class="o_mail_history_body"/>
                                <field name="email_body" invisible="1" force_save="1"/>
                            </sheet>
                        </form>
                    </field>
                </page>
            </xpath>
        </field>
    </record>
</odoo>

content.text: The fix is to change the `xpath` to target the last `<page>` inside the notebook and insert after it, which is a reliable anchor regardless of module load order.

content.text: Changed the xpath to `//notebook/page[last()]` with `position="after"`, which appends the Mail History page as the last tab regardless of what other pages exist — no dependency on `activities_table_tab` being present.

content: Added a priority field (P1/P2/P3) to the ticket system and cleaned up two view files. Next step is to restart Odoo with --update=ticket_system to apply the new database column and view changes. (disable recaps in /config)
